text: Purpose is that feeling that you are part of something bigger than yourself... Purpose is what creates true happiness.
context: The core message: in an age of automation, creating purpose for others is the generational challenge.

text: I'm here to tell you finding your purpose isn’t enough. The challenge for our generation is creating a world where everyone has a sense of purpose.
context: Distinguishing personal purpose from the larger task of building systems for universal purpose.

text: One of my favorite stories is when John F Kennedy visited the NASA space center, he saw a janitor carrying a broom and he walked over and asked what he was doing. The janitor responded: 'Mr. President, I’m helping put a man on the moon.'
context: Illustration of how everyone can feel part of a meaningful mission.

text: Every generation expands its definition of equality.
context: Historical context for redefining equality to include the freedom to pursue purpose.

text: Change starts local. Even global changes start small — with people like us.
context: Call to action that building community and purpose begins with individual initiative.

text: We can all make time to give someone a hand.
context: Simple, actionable way to create purpose for others.

text: It's really good to be idealistic. But be prepared to be misunderstood. Anyone working on a big vision is going to get called crazy.
context: Insight on the courage required to pursue ambitious social or technological change.

text: By taking on big meaningful projects together, by redefining equality so everyone has the freedom to pursue purpose, and by building community across the world.
context: Three concrete paths to creating purpose for more people.

text: There is something wrong with our system when I can leave here and make billions of dollars in 10 years while millions of students can't even afford to pay off their loans.
context: Critique of inequality and call for a new social contract.

text: Purpose is what creates true happiness and you are graduating at a time when this is especially important.
context: Linking personal fulfillment to collective purpose in the modern economy.
